text: for a new sitter, the two things worth writing down are mira's egg allergy (mild hives is what's shown up before) and that her blue elephant is her go-to comfort object at nap time — having both on a quick note means the sitter isn't caught off guard or hunting for what soothes her. if the allergy has ever needed more than hives-level care, that's worth confirming with your pediatric office so the sitter knows exactly what to watch for and what to do. want me to keep anything else in mind for her going forward?
